subcodes.first_line: Mukuru wandje! Mepura kOve mena rOye eyapuke, vatera ami ngumbiri omukarere wOye kutja mbiningapare, Ove unomasa komband
subcodes.notes: Theory: Short AB or BH prayer in Otjiherero -- "Mukuru wandje! Mepura kOve mena rOye eyapuke, vatera ami ngumbiri omukarere wOye..." = "O my Lord! I beg Thee by Thy pure Name to assist this servant of Thine..." Short supplication. From old Otjiherero book. Not found in inventory.
